strengths: 15+ years fullstack development with direct expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React; currently applying skills at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Demonstrated engineering excellence through TDD practice, microservices architecture, multiple staff-level positions, and active open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Comprehensive database and infrastructure experience spanning MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS CDK, Kubernetes; proven Git and CI/CD proficiency
concerns: Unexplained 8-month career gap from October 2025 to present (June 2026) requires context clarification
No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest; testing experience centers on D language libraries rather than JavaScript ecosystem frameworks critical to the role
Kotlin/Java limited in background; secondary backend language requirements not a primary focus across employment history

key_factors.factor: Direct expertise in primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases)
Framework specificity gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) despite strong Node.js foundation

response.justification: Bogdan presents a strong profile for a mid-senior fullstack role with 15+ years of development experience and proven expertise in the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). His background demonstrates architectural thinking, testing discipline, and current involvement in AI infrastructure work. However, the recent 8-month career gap needs explanation, and certain primary technologies (Nest.js, Vitest) lack explicit mention, though his strong Node.js foundation would support rapid adoption.
